name: part_004
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_004.webm

scenes.description: The three members interact on stage and Kobo leads the first audience shout.
Reaction to the shout and Zeta leads the next audience interaction.
Kaela leads the final part of the audience interaction sequence.
The members discuss their opening performance of '100%'.
The members discuss the previous performances and Kaela's new song 'dahlah.'

subtitles.original: はいよ、ゼータが怒ると怖いからね
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's scary when Zeta gets angry.

subtitles.original: 怖いよー
subtitles.english: I'm scared...

subtitles.original: もういいや、ゼータがカメラも独り占めしちゃダメっていうのは…うーん、しょうがない
subtitles.english: Fine, whatever. If Zeta says we can't hog the camera, then... sigh, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: ファンの皆んなと遊ぼう！
subtitles.english: Let's just play with the fans instead!

subtitles.original: さっきみんなからも大きな声もらったわけだし今度はこっちがみんなに大きな声を出したいっす！
subtitles.english: Since everyone cheered for us earlier, this time I want us to cheer for you all!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい、みんなと一緒に大きな声を出したいっすね！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes. I want us to shout our cheers together with the fans!

subtitles.original: そう！みんなにじゃなく、みんなとね
subtitles.english: Exactly! Shout with them, not at them.

subtitles.original: そうそう！そういうことっす！
subtitles.english: Yeah! That's what I meant!

subtitles.original: だってこれから歌わなきゃいけないからまずは声を温存しなきゃでしょ？
subtitles.english: We have to sing later, so shouldn't we save our voices first?

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、そんなにカエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's true. It won't take as long as one of my streams, so don't worry, guys.

subtitles.original: まあいい、大声出していいから好きにして
subtitles.english: Fine, if you want to shout, go ahead. I'm in.

subtitles.original: みんな準備はいいかな？
subtitles.english: How about it, everyone? Are you ready?

subtitles.original: いけるかな？
subtitles.english: Ready or not?!

subtitles.original: もう出来てるのかよっすね！じゃあここから！
subtitles.english: Seems like they are! Okay, starting with Kobo!

subtitles.original: 一緒に「BOKOBOKOBO！」って叫ぼう！よろしくいこうよ！
subtitles.english: I want us all to shout "BOKOBOKOBO!" together. Okay?

subtitles.original: いち、に、さん！
subtitles.english: Ready? One, two, three!

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBO！
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBO!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！次はゼータ！
subtitles.english: Cool, cool! Zeta's turn, Zeta's turn!

subtitles.original: 「ミッションスタート」って言ったら一緒に「スタート」って言うわ！
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. When I say "Mission Starto", you all shout "Starto" together!

subtitles.original: いい？アアア！ミッション…
subtitles.english: Ready? Ahh... mission...

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: Starto!

subtitles.original: 次はカエラ！
subtitles.english: Okay, Kaela's next!

subtitles.original: よしよし！きてみんもそしてholoh3roも
subtitles.english: Alright! This is for all the fans and HoloH3ro too.

subtitles.original: 「holoh3ro！」って言ったら「HU-HA！」で返してね！簡単でしょ？
subtitles.english: When I say "HoloH3ro!", you respond with "HU-HA!". Easy, right?

subtitles.original: さあさあさあ！
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: 準備はいい？ holoh3ro！
subtitles.english: Ready? HoloH3ro!

subtitles.original: HU-HA！
subtitles.english: HU-HA!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！
subtitles.english: Great, great, great!

subtitles.original: いいわ、ついに3期生は息ぴったり
subtitles.english: Awesome. Finally, Gen 3 is in sync.

subtitles.original: そうわ、まだまだ元気が残りそうね
subtitles.english: Yeah, looks like everyone's still full of energy.

subtitles.original: だって、今日の一曲目だけどももうすごく伝わってくるんだもん
subtitles.english: I mean, even from our first song today, I can really feel it.

subtitles.original: みんな、まさか私たちの1曲目が「100％」だったなんて思ってた？
subtitles.english: Did you guys ever suspect that our first song would be "100%"?

subtitles.original: 思うわけないよな、私もびっくりした
subtitles.english: No way anyone did. Even I was surprised myself.

subtitles.original: ホシノヴァ気分でライブ開始だなんて！すごいよね？
subtitles.english: Opening with Hoshinova mode like that. It was cool, right?

subtitles.original: かっこいいっすね、しかもさっきゼータとが歌った…いや違う
subtitles.english: It was so cool. Especially earlier when Zeta sang... no, wait.

subtitles.original: ゼータとか？ゼータとカエラが歌った時はもう本家の「100％」みたいっす
subtitles.english: Zeta? When Zeta and Kaela sang "100%", it felt like the real "100%".

subtitles.original: マジかっこよすぎなんだけど、なんか、うー！うー！ってなってき！
subtitles.english: It was just way too cool, I was like, "Whoa! Whoa!"

subtitles.original: あんあなかっこいい歌を歌ったことあるのかな？
subtitles.english: Have you guys ever sung such a cool song before?

subtitles.original: かっこつけてんの？本物のかっこつけ
subtitles.english: Aura farming? Real aura farming right there.

subtitles.original: そう、かっこつけてる、だってムーナの曲がかっこいいもん
subtitles.english: Yeah, it was cool. Moona's songs are just so cool.

subtitles.original: だってゼータがいつもスタイリッシュとかジャズっぽい曲ばっかっしょ？
subtitles.english: Because Zeta usually does stylish or jazzy songs, right?

subtitles.original: だからさっき「100％」を歌った時めっちゃ雰囲気が違う
subtitles.english: So when we sang "100%" just now, the vibes felt completely different.

subtitles.original: しかもカエラのラップも！
subtitles.english: And Kaela's rap too!

subtitles.original: なんかこう…とにかくかっこよかった！すごいわ！
subtitles.english: It was like... anyway, it was so cool! Amazing!

subtitles.original: とにかくかっこよかった！すごいわ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, it was really cool, really cool earlier.

subtitles.original: でも、それだけじゃないよ！次の曲が「NEW ZOMBIE!!」でした！
subtitles.english: But that's not all! The next song was "NEW ZOMBIE!!".

subtitles.original: これだれの曲かわかるよね？
subtitles.english: I'm sure you all know whose song this is?

subtitles.original: もちろんたよ、うちの先輩だ
subtitles.english: Of course, it's our senpai's.

subtitles.original: holoroのパフォーマンスもめっちゃかっこよかったよ、まるでゲームの中にいるみたいだった
subtitles.english: Holoro's performance was also really cool, it felt like being inside a game.

subtitles.original: そうっわ！しかもバックダンサーもいたし
subtitles.english: That's right! And there were backup dancers too, man.

subtitles.original: かっこよかったっすね！
subtitles.english: It was so cool, guys! Right?!

subtitles.original: 他になんかあったかな？レーザーも花火も…
subtitles.english: What else was there? Laser lights and fireworks too.

subtitles.original: すごいギミックがたくさんあったっすね！
subtitles.english: There were so many amazing stage gimmicks!

subtitles.original: あのバックダンサーたちあたしのソロライブに雇うっす
subtitles.english: I'm going to hire all those backup dancers for my solo concert.

subtitles.original: おっと、もうソロライブの話？
subtitles.english: Whoa, already talking about a solo concert.

subtitles.original: まあ言葉も祈りってやつ
subtitles.english: Well, thoughts become prayers.

subtitles.original: でもこのライブはまだ終わらないよ！まだあど！
subtitles.english: But this concert isn't over yet. Not yet, not yet.

subtitles.original: でも…さっき何の歌を歌ったか知ってる？
subtitles.english: But... do you guys know what song was sung before this?

subtitles.original: もちろんたよ、私の新しい曲たから
subtitles.english: Of course I know, it's my new song, "dahlah.".

subtitles.original: そうっすね、まあいいや
subtitles.english: Yeah, forget it.

subtitles.original: まあいい
subtitles.english: Forget it.

subtitles.original: いやいや！タイトルは「dahlah.」だよ！「dahlah.」！
subtitles.english: No, wait! The title is "dahlah.". "dahlah."!

subtitles.original: おおなるほど
subtitles.english: Oh, I see.

subtitles.original: 「dahlah.」だったか…先に言ってよ！
subtitles.english: So it was "dahlah."... You should've said so!

subtitles.original: だっていつもそれ言ってるじゃん、本当にまぁいいやって思ってた
subtitles.english: You say it all the time, I thought you were just being casual.

subtitles.original: それ言って帰ると思ってた
subtitles.english: I thought you were just saying it and going home.

subtitles.original: じゃあ「dahlah.」ってどういう意味？
subtitles.english: So what does "dahlah." actually mean?

subtitles.original: 人生はしょうがないって意味。人生は重いからまあいいやって言えばいいたけ、その後人生を続けようって意味
subtitles.english: It's about letting go. Life is hard, so just say "whatever", then keep moving forward with your life.

subtitles.original: そうっすね、大人になったらね
subtitles.english: That's true. Now that we're adults.
